task_completion.description: Verify that the MRHead volume is loaded in 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'MRHead' or 'MR-head' is visible in the Data module, Subject Hierarchy, or overlaid on the slice views.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent performed a navigation action (Python script or UI interaction)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Python Interactor is visible with 'JumpSlices' commands, OR the Crosshair/Markups toolbar is active, OR slice sliders have been moved.

task_completion.description: Verify the Right (R) coordinate is approximately 12.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Yellow (Sagittal) slice view annotation shows a position near '12.0', or the Data Probe panel displays 'R: 12.0' (±2).

task_completion.description: Verify the Anterior (A) coordinate is approximately -8.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Green (Coronal) slice view annotation shows a position near '-8.0', or the Data Probe panel displays 'A: -8.0' (±2).

task_completion.description: Verify the Superior (S) coordinate is approximately 35.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Red (Axial) slice view annotation shows a position near '35.0', or the Data Probe panel displays 'S: 35.0' (±2).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the 3D Slicer GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the standard 3D Slicer interface with slice views and toolbars.

integrity.description: Ensure the MRI data is actually rendered
integrity.visual_evidence: The slice views show grayscale brain anatomy, not blank black/white screens.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is not just typing coordinates into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window is 3D Slicer, not Notepad or a terminal with manually typed 'Result: 12, -8, 35'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target RAS coordinates are (12.0, -8.0, 35.0) with a tolerance of ±2.0 mm. In 3D Slicer's default layout: The Red slice view corresponds to the S (Superior) axis (target 35.0). The Green slice view corresponds to the A (Anterior) axis (target -8.0). The Yellow slice view corresponds to the R (Right) axis (target 12.0). The Data Probe panel (usually bottom left) explicitly lists R, A, and S values.
